Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_REFERENCES_CODE AS REFERENCE_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_REFERENCES_EANCODE AS REFERENCE_EAN_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_REFERENCES_TYPE AS REFERENCE_TYPE,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCES

 

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_REFERENCES_CODE

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, REFERENCE_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
REFERENCE_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
REFERENCE_EAN_CODE TEXT,
REFERENCE_TYPE TEXT,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (REFERENCE_CODE_BK, COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing links between the product and its external references, including reference codes, EAN codes, and reference types, which support integration with external systems or regulatory reporting.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_CODE_BK is
'Reference Code (events_products_references_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_EAN_CODE is
'Reference EAN Code (events_products_references_eanCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_TYPE is
'Reference Type (events_products_references_type )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_REFERENCE

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.
